dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the enterprise is not going as planned. Your work to {quest_action} uncovered something we did not expect.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_is} far more dangerous than we anticipated. {quest_ally} barely made it back from {quest_focus_the} alive. The {enemy_type} have massed {location_hint} and they need to be fought through before we can continue.
dialogueChunks.outro: We have come too far to turn back now. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} within reach.

dialogueChunks.intro: Complications, {player_name}. After you managed to {quest_action}, we triggered something. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} become agitated.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} are now actively guarding the area around {quest_focus_the}. {quest_ally} thinks we need to deal with them directly before we can proceed. They have been concentrated {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: We are so close. Clear the way and {quest_stakes_the} will be ours.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I will not sugarcoat it. Our attempt to {quest_action} hit a wall. {quest_threat_The} destroyed our preparations.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to start over, and quickly. {quest_ally} says there is an alternate approach through an area {location_hint}, but the {enemy_type} have been seen there. Someone needs to push through and secure {quest_item} for a second attempt.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} slipping further away every day we delay. Are you still with us?
